name: Urbit

unions.name: MessageData
unions.comment:
An incoming message may be one of the following:

  - `Poke` represents a response for a previous poke
  - `Subscribe` represents a response for a subscription requests
  - `Diff` represents a new incoming diff for a subscription
  - `Quit` means you have been kicked from a subscription and should likely
    attempt to resubscribe

In all cases the first `Int` value represents the Id of the message it is
relevant to.

unions.name: Session
unions.comment: A session represents an active connection to an urbit ship.

values.name: ack
values.comment:
Acknowledge an incoming message. Must be performed for every incoming
message received.
values.type: { lastEventId : Basics.Int, session : Urbit.Session } -> (Result.Result Http.Error () -> msg) -> ( Urbit.Session, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: connect
values.comment:
Connect to an urbit ship and return a `Session` on success. Should be
followed by [setupEventSource](#setupEventSource) (this must be done as a
separate step due to the nature of Elm ports).

You can generate a unique `channelId` any way you wish, however the provided
[genChannelId](#genChannelId) function is recommended.
values.type: { ship : String.String, url : String.String, channelId : String.String, code : String.String } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Urbit.Session -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: connectUnauth
values.comment:
Alternative to [connect](#connect) that does not require a `code`.

**Note:** Ensure the correct cookie is set through some other means beforehand
or else this will not work. Hosting from within an urbit using the :file-server
app with public set to false should work, for example.
values.type: { ship : String.String, url : String.String, channelId : String.String } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Urbit.Session -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: disconnect
values.comment: Safely deletes a channel.

values.name: genChannelId
values.comment:
Recommended way to create a unique id for a session's channel. Takes the
current time and returns a random generator which can then be used to generate
the full ID.

values.name: genUid
values.comment:
Helper for generating random urbit UIDs.

Based off of <https://github.com/urbit/urbit/blob/137e4428f617c13f28ed31e520eff98d251ed3e9/pkg/interface/src/lib/util.js#L3>

values.name: lastEventId
values.comment: Get a Session's lastEventId.

values.name: login
values.comment:
Login to an urbit without maintaining an active connection. This will allow
for stateless scry and spider requests that require authentication but _not_
others.

**Note:** This is not required if you have already used [connect](#connect) to
authenticate.
values.type: { url : String.String, code : String.String } -> (Result.Result Http.Error () -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: messages
values.comment:
Subscribe to incoming messages from urbit. See [setupEventSource](#setupEventSource)
above for instructions on how to use this. Every message received _must_ be
acknowledged by using the related [ack](#ack) function, otherwise urbit will
stop accepting any further messages.
values.type: ((Json.Encode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg) -> (Result.Result Json.Decode.Error Urbit.Message -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

values.name: poke
values.comment: Poke an app on a ship.
values.type: { ship : String.String, app : String.String, mark : String.String, json : Json.Encode.Value, session : Urbit.Session } -> (Result.Result Http.Error () -> msg) -> ( Urbit.Session, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: scry
values.comment: Make a scry request.
values.type: { url : String.String, app : String.String, path : String.String, mark : String.String, decoder : Json.Decode.Decoder a } -> (Result.Result Http.Error a -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: setupEventSource
ship
values.comment: Get a Session's ship.

values.name: spider
values.comment: Start a thread and get the response.
values.type: { url : String.String, inputMark : String.String, outputMark : String.String, threadName : String.String, body : Json.Encode.Value } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: subscribe
values.comment: Subscribe to ship events on some path.
values.type: { ship : String.String, app : String.String, path : String.String, session : Urbit.Session } -> (Result.Result Http.Error () -> msg) -> ( Urbit.Session, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: uid
values.comment: Get a Session's uid.

values.name: unsubscribe
values.comment: Unsubscribe from an existing subscription.
values.type: Basics.Int -> Urbit.Session -> (Result.Result Http.Error () -> msg) -> ( Urbit.Session, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: url
values.comment: Get a Session's url.

name: Urbit.Graph

unions.name: Node
unions.comment: A node in a graph. Contains a [Post](#Post) and possibly children.

unions.name: Update
unions.comment: Represents a change to the graph store.

aliases.name: Index
aliases.comment: An index uniquely identifying a node within a graph.

aliases.name: Post
aliases.comment: A post in a graph. The contents are a list of JSON values.
aliases.type: { index : Urbit.Graph.Index, author : String.String, timeSent : Time.Posix, contents : List.List Json.Encode.Value, hash : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: Resource
aliases.comment: A pair of a ship and a name uniquely identifying a graph.

values.name: addNodes
values.comment: Add nodes to the graph store.
values.type: { resource : Urbit.Graph.Resource, nodes : List.List Urbit.Graph.Node, session : Urbit.Session } -> (Result.Result Http.Error () -> msg) -> ( Urbit.Session, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: addNodesSpider
values.comment: Add nodes to the graph store via a spider thread.
values.type: { url : String.String, resource : Urbit.Graph.Resource, nodes : List.List Urbit.Graph.Node } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: codeContent
values.comment: Create a `code` content type for a post.

values.name: createManagedGraph
values.comment: Create a new graph associated with an existing group.
values.type: { url : String.String, group : Urbit.Graph.Resource, resource : Urbit.Graph.Resource, title : String.String, description : String.String, graphModule : String.String, mark : String.String } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: createUnmanagedGraph
values.comment: Create a new graph unassociated with any group.
values.type: { url : String.String, resource : Urbit.Graph.Resource, title : String.String, description : String.String, invites : List.List String.String, graphModule : String.String, mark : String.String } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: deleteGraphSpider
values.comment: Delete a graph from the graph store via a spider thread.
values.type: { url : String.String, resource : Urbit.Graph.Resource } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: emptyStore
values.comment: Create an empty [Store](#Store).

values.name: getFromStore
values.comment: Get a graph from a [Store](#Store) using a resource.

values.name: getGraph
values.comment: Get a graph from the graph store.
values.type: { url : String.String, resource : Urbit.Graph.Resource } -> (Result.Result Http.Error Urbit.Graph.Update -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: getNodeChildren
values.comment: Get the children of a node.

values.name: getNodePost
values.comment: Get the post associated with a node.

values.name: mentionContent
values.comment: Create a `mention` content type for a post.

values.name: newNode
values.comment: Create a new node from a post.

values.name: subscribeToGraphUpdates
values.comment: Subscribe to changes to the graph store.
values.type: { ship : String.String, session : Urbit.Session } -> (Result.Result Http.Error () -> msg) -> ( Urbit.Session, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: textContent
values.comment: Create a `text` content type for a post.

values.name: updateDecoder
values.comment:
Decode a graph store update, typically from an incoming diff or scry
request.

values.name: updateStore
values.comment: Apply a change to the graph store.

values.name: urlContent
values.comment: Create a `url` content type for a post.
